name: Law Offices of Gary D. Nitzkin, P.C.
description_short: Columbus, Ohio-based bankruptcy law firm offering free legal services to Ohio consumers. Specializes in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing and representation.
description_long:
Law Offices of Gary D. Nitzkin, P.C. is a bankruptcy law practice located at 41 S High St #240 in Columbus, Ohio. The firm is listed in the USLegal attorney directory as a provider of bankruptcy services throughout Ohio. According to the directory listing, the practice offers free legal services to consumers in the state, making it accessible to individuals who may have financial constraints in addition to their bankruptcy concerns.

The firm specializes in bankruptcy law, with their primary service offering being bankruptcy representation and filing assistance. Based on the available directory information, they handle the standard bankruptcy categories that most consumer bankruptcy attorneys manage: Chapter 7 liquidation bankruptcies and Chapter 13 wage earner plans. The firm appears to focus exclusively on consumer bankruptcy rather than business bankruptcy services.

A distinguishing factor of this practice is their stated commitment to providing free legal services to consumers throughout Ohio, which suggests they may work with clients who cannot afford standard legal fees or may accept cases on a pro bono basis. Their location in Columbus positions them to serve the central Ohio region, though they indicate they serve the entire state.

The main limitation in evaluating this firm is the minimal information available through the USLegal directory listing. The website content provides only basic contact information and general service categorization without detailed case results, attorney credentials, specific bankruptcy experience, client reviews, or granular service descriptions. Prospective clients would need to contact the firm directly at (216) 358-0591 to discuss specific bankruptcy situations, fee structures, and case experience.
address: 41 S High St Suite 240, Columbus, OH 43215

company_info.headquarters: 41 S High St Suite 240, Columbus, OH 43215

pros: Offers free legal services to consumers, reducing cost barriers for bankruptcy filing
Serves the entire state of Ohio, not limited to Columbus area
Listed in established USLegal attorney directory for verification
Specializes exclusively in bankruptcy law rather than general practice
Accessible phone contact (216) 358-0591 for direct inquiry
cons: Minimal public information available about attorney credentials, experience, or track record
No client testimonials, case results, or success metrics published online
No detail on specific bankruptcy services, fees, or whether free service applies to all clients or only certain cases
Limited web presence beyond directory listing; no independent website with service details
best_for: Ohio residents considering Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy with limited legal budgets
Central Ohio consumers seeking free initial bankruptcy consultation
Individuals throughout Ohio needing statewide bankruptcy representation
diagnosis: This firm is best for Ohio consumers seeking free or low-cost bankruptcy representation, particularly those filing Chapter 7 or Chapter 13. The primary caveat is the lack of detailed public information—prospective clients must call directly to verify current services, understand fee structures, and assess attorney qualifications before committing.
services: Free legal services to Ohio consumers
